titleZh: 新公司法项下董事任期届满之后职务行为效力的分析和建议
titleEn: Analysis and Suggestions on the Validity of Directors' Acts After the Expiry of Their Terms Under the New Company Law
abstractZh: 结合新旧公司法和司法实践，讨论董事任期届满但继任者未及时产生时，其继续履职的法律依据、对外行为效力和章程设计建议。
abstractEn: Assesses the legal basis and practical risks of directors continuing to act after their term expires, with governance and charter-drafting suggestions drawn from legislation and case law.
